Visit the Cougar Career Closet Welcome to the Career Development Center! The SIUE Career Development Center is open and ready to assist students! We offer resume assistance and appointments in areas such as career counseling, assessments, choosing a major, job search, LinkedIn, mentor program, networking strategies, and mock interviews. If you are interested in scheduling an appointment, you can do so through your Cougar Jobline account. You can also call our front desk at 618-650-3708 or send a message to careerdevelopment@siue.edu for staff assistance in scheduling your appointment.
